Name: MULTI_PLAY_CORRECTION_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the adjustments to apply to client players during a multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Client - SpEffect ID: 1
Fields.Description: An effect to apply to a friendly client.

Fields.Name: Client - SpEffect ID: 2
Fields.Description: An effect to apply to a friendly client.

Fields.Name: Client - SpEffect ID: 3
Fields.Description: An effect to apply to a friendly client.

Fields.Name: Adjust SpEffects on Client Count Change
Fields.Description: If ON, when the number of clients changes, re-assess the SpEffect applications.
